title: Protocol for Adaptive Emission Reduction Approach (AERA) simulations
author: Frölicher Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The document describes the updated protocol for the Adaptive Emission Reduction Approach simulations version 2.0. Anthropogenic temperature is now estimated with a simple extended 31-yr running mean of GSAT instead of using the fit method on the radiative forcing.
steps_raw: The document describes the updated protocol for the Adaptive Emission Reduction Approach simulations version 2.0. Anthropogenic temperature is now estimated with a simple extended 31-yr running mean of GSAT instead of using the fit method on the radiative forcing.
